input_text: Anna handed Mark a key. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. Penguins live in the water. Americans cannot disappear. An old nice grey elephant was strong. Emily is a wolf. John has finished his homework. Eve sent Tom a letter. Tallinn is in Estonia. The mountain is higher than the hill. Gertrude is a cat. The teacher showed a map to the students. A coffee cup broke. The stone was heavy. Mary visited London in September. The dog chased by the boy escaped. This book is more interesting than that one. Is the homework unfinished?
